prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约6657→9991→7694，2024年大幅后移后2025年有所回升，近3年波动较大；2025年基准约7694名；本省理科计划2023 年4人，2024年缩至1人，2025年维持1人；2026年大幅扩招至7人（含南疆单列和国家专项），扩招幅度达600%，竞争压力显著缓解，位次预计大幅后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第177–180名，近年排名稳定；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学校管理及校园安全争议；但抖音热度为高热（总排名第18），短视 频曝光量大，报考关注度不低；综合影响中性偏负面；北京体育大学以体育学为特色，相关专业吸引力稳定。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 本省2025年理科考生约5.25万人，2026年总考生约23.8万人，按近年理科占比约68.6%估算，2026年理科考生约16.3万人，较2025年大幅增加，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年理科招生计划从1人扩至7人（扩招600%）这一主导因素，位次将大幅后移；但本省理科考生规模从约5.25万增至约16.3万， 竞争加剧部分对冲扩招效应；声誉偏负面亦有微弱下压作用。预测最低位次约34894名，区间34394–35394名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum science ranking was approximately 6657 → 9991 → 7694, with a significant drop in 2024 followed by a recovery in 2025, showing large fluctuations over the past three years; the 2025 baseline is about 7694th place; the provincial science enrollment plan was 4 students in 2023, reduced to 1 in 2024, and maintained at 1 in 2025; in 2026, it will expand significantly to 7 students (including Southern Xinjiang single-column and national special programs), an increase of 600%, greatly easing competition pressure, and the ranking is expected to drop significantly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 177–180th, stable in recent years; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management and campus safety controversies; however, Douyin popularity is high (total ranking 18th), with significant short video exposure and considerable application attention; overall impact is neutral to slightly negative; Beijing Sport University is characterized by sports science, with stable appeal of related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2025, the province had approximately 52,500 science examinees, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is about 238,000. Based on the recent science proportion of about 68.6%, the estimated number of science examinees in 2026 is about 163,000, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the dominant factor that the 2026 science enrollment plan expands from 1 to 7 students (a 600% increase), the ranking will drop significantly; however, the provincial science examinee count increases from about 52,500 to about 163,000, partially offsetting the expansion effect; the slightly negative reputation also exerts a weak downward pressure. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 34894th, with a range of 34394–35394th.
